scripts.dev: pnpm run db:up && concurrently --kill-others --names DB,BACKEND,FRONTEND --prefix-colors cyan,green,yellow "docker compose logs -f postgres" "pnpm run dev:backend" "pnpm run dev:frontend"
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && dotnet ef database update
scripts.db:drop: cd backend && dotnet ef database drop --force
scripts.db:reset: pnpm run db:drop && pnpm run db:migrate
scripts.setup: pnpm install && cd backend && dotnet restore && pnpm run db:up && sleep 3 && pnpm run db:migrate
